friendly_name: API Surface Completion: Domain Services, Alias Retirement, Async Transport
purpose_context: Closes out epic #645 by extracting glossary and lint services into their canonical domain modules, retiring deprecated API aliases, adding SSE-based async push, and wiring up the OpenAPI TypeScript codegen pipeline. Focuses on the read side of the API and domain service layer.
purpose_tldr: Glossary/lint service extraction, alias retirement, SSE async transport, TypeScript codegen pipeline.
source_description: Epic #645 comment 4369983868 (2026-05-04): Steps 5+6, alias retirement, Mission C (#954 + #955).
